name: Grave/Digger — RPG
description:
Hey hey! Your favorite dumbass is back to update fuckall but the icon! (Cudos to the person who pointed the outdated beta image) so its just a simple change but I wanna hear something from you guys. Well your opinion. So I'll get straight too it.

(Also srry for bad grammer dont kill me over it-)

— with one of the new updates to JanAI now allows for multiple starter messages. So I was curious if I do one of two things. Add specific intros to each faction (I.e make intros catered to each factions and subfactions with the last one being a "choose your own start" type of intro) or keep the same vague. "Wake up bs"

— the other thing is that I have a scenario bot, somewhat in the works (not really) and its based on grave/digger but in another world (fantasy type of world) but im starting with the royal nation first and I'll maybe (but dont hold me on this. I more nation biased then Empire.) Make the same scenario with the Golden empire as well. Its just a scenario where RN/GE finds a set of steel doors that lead into a fantasy world (like in GATE. Good anime to watch would recommend if you want an anime to watch)

—Lastly I kindly thank all of you who use my bots. I never really thought my bot in particular would be used since there's other rpg bots out there based on grave/digger. But still. Thanks guys. I dunno what to feel about this other then im happy you guys like what I made.

So please id like to hear your opinion on what I should do with what I said above. But please do remember, im not a bot maker like others. So please bare with me when I makes changes on what you guys tell me!

But as always if you like my content. Heart it or follow i dont care really. If you dont. You dont. Chat safe and have a good day!

(OLD TEXT IGNORE IF YOU WANT Might delete this) Guess what Fuckers!? I updated this bot!

(You might have to start a new chat i think- I don't know how Jan ai bots work lol)

So after the jeager kit came out I said to myself that I'd update this bot and try to optimize this bot after I've tried the newer kits out (this was back when Rooks kit came out) so yeah I've added shotgun trooper, bulwark trooper, and Geist Trooper. I've also tried to get the underground setting consistent (since for some reason, bot thinks you are still on the surface and not in caves, underground base, outpost, etc.) I've also removed some unnecessary words and reworded some faction stuff, as well as adding descriptions of how shock trooper helms look like. (Keep in mind that I don't know what I'm doing so bare with me). Also checked and rewrote the intro (because I have bad fucking Grammer) anyways will i update it again? Maybe. Will i make individual shock trooper bots? (maybe for both Royal Nation and Golden Empire so people can chat with either/or And not feel left out? Probably if I have the time and mental stability to make bots and test them). Anyways I do have a "The Outlast Trials" rpg already made just testing it out before I make it public (if people want that-). But that's about it. Have fun chatting or don't- it's up to you lol.

Also
creator: Forgotten_agent
